title: assertion failure when deleting rows from table to which a FK constraint is defined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE PKTABLE (ptest1 Int32, ptest2 Int32, ptest3 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (ptest1, ptest2);
CREATE TABLE FKTABLE (ftest1 Int32, ftest2 Int32, ftest3 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (ftest1, ftest2);
DELETE FROM PKTABLE WHERE ptest1 = 1 AND ptest2 = 2;
key_bug_features: deleting rows with foreign key constraint defined
